top_signals.title: IEA Sees Massive Oil Surplus In 2027 As Middle East Supply Returns
top_signals.summary: The global oil market could swing from one of the largest supply disruptions in history to a surplus of more than 5 million barrels per day next year if Middle East production and exports recover following the U.S.-Iran peace agreement, the International Energy Agency (IEA) said on Wednesday, as reported by Reuters. In its first outlook for 2027, the Paris-based agency forecast global oil supply growth of 8 million barrels per day, far outpacing projected demand growth of just 2 million bpd. The result would be a supply surplus of roughly 5 million…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US lawmakers warn against presidential pardon for Sam Bankman-Fried
top_signals.summary: The former FTX CEO is currently serving a 25-year sentence after being found guilty on seven felony charges related to the misuse of customer funds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Intermodal pulls away from carload rail freight
top_signals.summary:
U.S. railroads notched up freight traffic in the latest week, as total volumes more than doubled growth year-to-date.

The post Intermodal pulls away from carload rail freight appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: To avoid backlash, tech giants must share their AI wealth before it’s too late
top_signals.summary: The US cannot wait for the worst job losses to hit before moving corporate and public policy in a pro-worker direction
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bowls Club is the City’s most eccentric (and brilliant) pop-up
top_signals.summary: The Bowls Club in Finsbury Square is the City’s eccentric pop up that makes you feel like you’re anywhere but London. top_signals.title: BHP to sell $1.5B Chile power lines in copper-first pivot
top_signals.summary: The transaction would include the transmission lines that feed power to  its Escondida, Spence and Cerro Colorado mines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Rare Earths Americas hits 44.5% TREO at Shiloh project in Georgia
top_signals.summary: The company is focused on heavy rare earth elements used in permanent magnets and defense applications.

top_signals.title: Rare earth refiner gets $500M loan from Pentagon to build ‘Freedom Facility’
top_signals.summary: The commitment is part of a roughly $1 billion initiative to expand US capacity to separate and produce rare earths.
